bugs:
----------------------------------------
define i32 @test_miscompilation() {
entry:
  %add = add i32 42, 0
  %mul = mul i32 42, 1
  %and = and i32 42, 4294967295
  %or = or i32 42, 0
  %ptr = alloca i64 16, align 16
  store i32 %add, ptr %ptr, align 16
  %arrayidx1 = gep inbounds ptr %ptr, 16 x i64 0, 4 x i64 1
  store i32 %mul, ptr %arrayidx1, align 4
  %arrayidx2 = gep inbounds ptr %ptr, 16 x i64 0, 4 x i64 2
  store i32 %and, ptr %arrayidx2, align 8
  %arrayidx3 = gep inbounds ptr %ptr, 16 x i64 0, 4 x i64 3
  store i32 %or, ptr %arrayidx3, align 4
  %result = load i32, ptr %ptr, align 16
  ret i32 %result
}
=>
define i32 @test_miscompilation() {
entry:
  %ptr = alloca i64 16, align 16
  store <4 x i32> { 0, 42, 42, 0 }, ptr %ptr, align 16
  %result = load i32, ptr %ptr, align 16
  ret i32 %result
}
Transformation doesn't verify!

ERROR: Value mismatch

Example:

Source:
i32 %add = #x0000002a (42)
i32 %mul = #x0000002a (42)
i32 %and = #x0000002a (42)
i32 %or = #x0000002a (42)
ptr %ptr = pointer(local, block_id=0, offset=0) / Address=#x100

ptr %arrayidx2 = pointer(local, block_id=0, offset=8) / Address=#x108
ptr %arrayidx3 = pointer(local, block_id=0, offset=12) / Address=#x10c
i32 %result = #x0000002a (42)
